name: Valkyrie  Yuna
description: Valkyrie had the figure of a slim woman with a dark skin tone, and long, red-colored hair tied in a ponytail. She was very tall, taller than all other Shining Stars. She wore a light-colored, form-fitting, and armored battle suit with green gauntlets, pauldrons, and a pair of winged boots with "E1" on her chest.

name: Wanibe
description: Wanibe is a reptilian who took up Kinji on one of his get-rich-quick schemes. Now he's thoroughly wrapped up in Kinji's shenanigans. A helpless guy who mostly ends up getting used as an underling, which suits him just fine.

name: Wuyao Lang
description: Lang Wu Yao, "Rou Fu You", (浪巫謠), is a major ally featured in Thunderbolt Fantasy Sword seekers. Wu Yao grew up in the mountains with a mother who only wanted her son to live up to the voice that he was born with. When he becomes sick, she accidentally kills herself after his voice changes. Going off on his own, he gets a job playing for a bar, using the pipa his mother played. name: Zanac Valleon Igana Ryle Vaiself
nativeName: ザナック・ヴァルレオン・イガナ・ライル・ヴァイセルフ
description: Zanac is the Second Prince of Re-Estize Kingdom, son of Lanposa III. He is the younger brother of Barbro and older brother of Renner. He is described as a short and fat man. He is described as an incompetent person, but is actually quite sensible, capable of comprehending the true natures of Renner and Marquis Raeven. Zanac is aiming for the throne and as such wants to remove the first prince from the line of succession. (Source: Overlord Wiki)

name: 666:Satan

He has become the Master of the First Heavenly Realm by defeating the former master Beelzebub. He seems to be very curious in Jin Mo-Ri, as Beelzebub states that he pays close attention to him.
